calendar.matters:
Motion To Tax Amended Costs
Off Calendar Jan-11-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

PLAINTIFF HENRY LAW'S Motion To Tax Amended Costs is off calendar at the request of the moving party.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/EG)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2015 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2015 Set For Order To Show Cause On Oct-27-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Set For Case Management Conference On Sep-09-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar May-29-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Scott Dunning, of the Dunning Law Firm, Tel. 415.956.1888, for plaintiffs;
Mike Morse, of the Law Office of Catherine A. Walsh, Tel. 925.825.9500, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS MOLLY HALL-WEAVER, WHITNEY SCOTT, AND CLAIRE SCOTT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. The undisputed evidence demonstrates that defendants did not breach a duty of care and cause the accident. It is undisputed that plaintiff ran the red light and collided with defendants' vehicle. (Hall-Weaver dec., pars. 6-7; Griesen depo., 16:4-7; 17:2-18; 37:9-18; 44:1-4.). The court sustains defendants' objection to the McGrew declaration as lacking foundation and speculative. No reasonable trier of fact could find that defendants breached a duty of care and caused the accident. Order signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
